title: MasterClass Casserole Dish with Lid, Large 5L/28 cm, Lightweight Cast Aluminium, Induction Hob and Oven Safe, Black
features: What You'll Get - Black Large Casserole Pot With Lid, 5 Litre 28 cm, Lightweight Cast Aluminium which offers all the benefits of cast iron, but is lightweight and easy to handle
Non Stick and Scratch Proof - Enjoy easy cleaning and fuss-free food release with the ultra-strong, double-layer non-stick coating
Hob to Oven Casserole Dish - absorbs heat quickly for fast and even cooking in ovens and on hobs, including induction hobs, so its great for braising meat
Self Basting Lid - Make lush roasts without having to constantly check and baste by hand, so you can enjoy ultimate convenience
Guaranteed Quality - PFA & PFOA free and Dishwasher Safe. This tough and surprisingly lightweight casserole dish comes with the MasterClass Lifetime Guarantee.
description: From the manufacturer Cook with Confidence Experiment, create and accomplish: with outstanding design, premium quality and a passion for food, MasterClass helps you cook with confidence. MasterClass Casserole Dish with Lid MasterClass 5L Cast Aluminium Dish is lighter than iron but just as strong. A perfect blend of innovative design and timeless style, this multi-use casserole dish is great for baking and roasting in the oven or slow-cooking and stewing on the hob, including induction. This round casserole pot makes cooking a dream as it enhances heat conduction so your meals cook quicker and more evenly. The self-basting lid keeps all those delicious juices in, without having to constantly check and baste by hand, resulting in flavourful meals The cast aluminium casserole dish also boasts two layers of premium non-stick and scratch-proof coating for effortless food release and easy cleaning. Just pop it into the dishwasher for the best results. More Information MasterClass Cast Aluminium Black Casserole Dish, 5L Self-basting lid included Oven safe up to 200°C (392°F) Stovetop suitable, including induction Capacity: 5 litres (1 gallon) Key Features Cast aluminium for improved cooking results This shallow casserole dish is made of high-quality cast aluminium. It's a very strong heat conductor, so it cooks fast and spreads the heat evenly through your food. It's great for braising beef and onions for a stew, or sautéing sausages for a casserole. Double layer non-stick coating Its smart speckled grey interior certainly makes it stand out. But it also plays an important part in cooking. This double layer acts as a scratch-proof, non-stick. So, not only does it prevent your food from sticking, it also keeps this casserole dish protected. A healthy choice The scratch-resistant, non-stick coating means you can fry ingredients using less oil, so the end result is healthier and just as tasty. Safe for all heat sources With its stainless steel base, you can use this casserole dish with all heat sources - including induction, radiant ring, gas, halogen, ceramic and solid plate. It's oven-safe to 200 degrees Celsius (392 degrees Fahrenheit) too. At MasterClass, we love food. Trust MasterClass to elevate your culinary experience - whether you're feeding a family, entertaining to impress, or striving to become the best home chef you can be.
